scripts.db:wipe-staging: npm run db:wipe-staging:storage && npm run db:wipe-staging:data
scripts.db:types: supabase gen types typescript --linked > supabase/types/database.ts && node scripts/sync-database-types.mjs
scripts.ci:mobile: cd sheger-mobile && npm ci && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.ci:admin: cd sheger-admin && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.ci: npm run ci:mobile && npm run ci:admin
